name: Matomo
description: Matomo — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Web Analytics.

seo.title: Matomo Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Matomo analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Matomo is a Product Analytics tool.
pros: Deep funnel and cohort analysis for product decisions
cons: Steeper learning curve for non-technical stakeholders
review.best_for: Product teams tracking user behavior and retention
review.not_for: Marketing-only analytics or pure content sites

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
